hero.title: Software Engineer & AI Specialist
hero.subtitle: Master's student in Computer Science & Software Engineering at Constructor University Bremen. 2+ years of industry experience building scalable backend systems, AI pipelines, and multi-agent applications.

about.title: About Me
about.bio1: Master's student in Computer Science & Software Engineering with 2+ years of industry experience across backend development, computer vision, and multi-agent AI systems. Proficient in Python, C++, React, and Flask, with hands-on deployment of LLM pipelines and automated testing frameworks.
about.bio2: Particularly interested in backend infrastructure, AI integration, and developer tooling. I'm passionate about building robust, scalable solutions that push engineering to the next level. Winner of the Constructor X BMW Group GenAI Hackathon 2026.
about.tech_skills: Python, C++, React, Flask, Docker, YOLO, OpenAI/Gemini

bmw.title: BMW GenAI Hackathon Winner
bmw.desc: Engineered a multi-agent HR platform implementing Gemini-powered job analysis, Supabase vector databases, and iterative candidate discovery for precision talent ranking.

simcarma.title: SimCarma
simcarma.desc: Developed Python backend microservices for a gamified soft-skill assessment platform connecting HR professionals and candidates with real-time analytics.

reliability.title: ReliabilityRadar
reliability.desc: Built a data-driven NLP pipeline using Python, BeautifulSoup, and Transformers, implementing sentiment analysis and named entity recognition to synthesize consumer automotive trends.

pigai.title: Intelligent Pig Gait Analysis
pigai.desc: Trained a custom C++ YOLO-based computer vision architecture to detect and classify animal gait abnormalities from video telemetry, significantly reducing agricultural labor costs.

pako.title: Software Developer
pako.desc: Co-developed C++ automation plugin for BricsCAD CAD software, eliminating manual drafting and reducing workflow time. Led weekly syncs with PERI engineers and managed end-to-end client communication.

mindtronic.title: Software Developer Intern
mindtronic.org: Mindtronic AI Co. Ltd. (Taipei) • Jul 2022 - Sep 2022
mindtronic.desc: Built an automated accuracy testing pipeline for Driver Monitoring System using Python, React, and Arduino. Engineered motion-command sequencing and integrated uPlot for real-time waveform visualization.

neten.title: Software Developer Intern
neten.desc: Built a camera-based document scanning and classification pipeline using Python and Flask. Automated document filing with QR/barcode recognition and scripted image processing workflows.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to discussing AI, machine learning, and exciting opportunities.
